message:
chore(raptorq): transfer closure packet ownership to E3 validator lane

The RaptorQ program closure signoff packet was originally owned by
the H2/Track-H bead set (asupersync-2f71w / asupersync-p8o9m).
That lane is now historical — the active validator is the E3 lane
(asupersync-3bsp5.4 / asupersync-3bsp5).

Coordinated updates:
  - docs/raptorq_program_closure_signoff_packet.md: reframes the
    packet as a blocked-state refresh owned by E3, preserving
    historical lineage in prose
  - artifacts/raptorq_program_closure_signoff_packet_v1.json: bead
    IDs, external_ref, timestamp, finalization rule, status reasons,
    and follow-up ownership entries all updated to the new lane
  - tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs: bead ID and external_ref
    assertions updated from old identifiers to the refresh bead;
    missing go_no_go_decision extraction inserted before use in
    dependency alignment test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
 {
   "artifact_id": "raptorq-program-closure-signoff-packet-v1",
   "schema_version": "raptorq-h2-program-closure-signoff-packet-v1",
-  "track_bead_id": "asupersync-2f71w",
-  "parent_track_bead_id": "asupersync-p8o9m",
-  "external_ref": "bd-23cxf",
-  "generated_at_utc": "2026-03-23T08:25:00Z",
+  "track_bead_id": "asupersync-3bsp5.4",
+  "parent_track_bead_id": "asupersync-3bsp5",
+  "external_ref": "bd-2finy",
+  "generated_at_utc": "2026-04-01T19:05:00Z",
   "packet_state": {
     "status": "draft_blocked",
     "go_no_go_decision": "no_go_pending_dependency_closure",
@@ -15,12 +15,12 @@
   },
   "go_no_go_decision": {
     "current_verdict": "no_go_pending_dependency_closure",
-    "decision_owner_bead_id": "asupersync-p8o9m",
-    "packet_curator_bead_id": "asupersync-2f71w",
+    "decision_owner_bead_id": "asupersync-3bsp5",
+    "packet_curator_bead_id": "asupersync-3bsp5.4",
     "blocking_dependency_ids": [
       "asupersync-2cyx5"
     ],
-    "finalization_rule": "Track-H sign-off owner records the final go/no-go decision only after all required_beads are closed and the H2 packet remains synchronized with the active closure evidence."
+    "finalization_rule": "The active E3 validator owner records the final go/no-go decision only after all required_beads are closed, Track-G is no longer blocked, and the H2 packet remains synchronized with the active Track-E closure evidence."
   },
   "command_policy": {
     "cargo_heavy_commands_must_use_rch": true,
@@ -142,7 +142,7 @@
       "track_bead_id": "asupersync-p8o9m",
       "required_status": "closed",
       "current_status": "closed",
-      "status_reason": "Track-H finalization/sign-off completed; Track-G is the sole remaining blocker before final sign-off publication.",
+      "status_reason": "Historical Track-H finalization/sign-off is closed; the live blocked-state refresh is carried by the active E3 validator lane while Track-G remains the sole remaining blocker before final sign-off publication.",
       "closure_dependency_path": "direct",
       "evidence_refs": [
         "docs/raptorq_program_closure_signoff_packet.md",
@@ -454,14 +454,14 @@
   ],
   "follow_up_ownership": [
     {
-      "bead_id": "asupersync-p8o9m",
+      "bead_id": "asupersync-3bsp5",
       "role": "track_signoff_owner",
-      "handoff_expectation": "Finalize go/no-go decision and publish closure communication."
+      "handoff_expectation": "Record the final go/no-go decision once Track-G closes and the remaining Track-E evidence bundle is reconciled."
     },
     {
-      "bead_id": "asupersync-2f71w",
+      "bead_id": "asupersync-3bsp5.4",
       "role": "packet_curator",
-      "handoff_expectation": "Keep evidence pointers and replay commands synchronized until closure."
+      "handoff_expectation": "Keep the blocked-state metadata, evidence pointers, and replay commands synchronized while Track-E/E5 remains active."
     }
   ]
 }

@@ -1,10 +1,12 @@
-# RaptorQ Program Closure Review and Sign-off Packet (H2 / bd-23cxf)
+# RaptorQ Program Closure Review and Sign-off Packet (H2 blocked-state refresh / bd-2finy)
 
-This document defines the H2 closure packet for:
+This document defines the current blocked-state refresh for the canonical H2
+closure packet:
 
-- Bead: `asupersync-2f71w`
-- Parent track: `asupersync-p8o9m`
-- External ref: `bd-23cxf`
+- Refresh bead: `asupersync-3bsp5.4`
+- Active validator owner: `asupersync-3bsp5`
+- External ref: `bd-2finy`
+- Historical H2 lineage: `asupersync-2f71w` under `asupersync-p8o9m`
 - Canonical artifact: `artifacts/raptorq_program_closure_signoff_packet_v1.json`
 
 ## Current State
@@ -17,9 +19,11 @@ This document defines the H2 closure packet for:
 This packet is intentionally execution-ready but not final until dependency
 closure conditions are satisfied.
 
-Track-G is the sole remaining blocker. Track-H is already closed, and the
-unresolved upstream convergence now sits in Track-E, especially `asupersync-36m6p`,
-which is consumed through the still-open Track-G governance path.
+Track-G is the sole remaining blocker. The historical Track-H/H2 packet lineage
+is already closed, but the live blocked-state refresh is now owned by
+`asupersync-3bsp5` with `asupersync-3bsp5.4` curating the packet until the
+remaining Track-E convergence, especially `asupersync-36m6p`, settles through
+the still-open Track-G governance path.
 
 ## Claim Boundaries
 
@@ -94,16 +98,18 @@ not closure-ready until `TRACK_G` is still the sole blocker and
 it names who curates the packet while H2 remains draft-blocked and who is
 responsible for the final go/no-go publication once Track-G closes.
 
-Blocked-state ownership is explicit and stable:
+Blocked-state ownership is explicit and stable while the packet stays
+`draft_blocked`:
 
-1. `track_signoff_owner` -> `asupersync-p8o9m`
-2. `packet_curator` -> `asupersync-2f71w`
+1. `track_signoff_owner` -> `asupersync-3bsp5`
+2. `packet_curator` -> `asupersync-3bsp5.4`
 
 `go_no_go_decision` is also a top-level packet record. In the current
 `draft_blocked` state it must mirror the packet-state verdict, carry the same
 blocking dependency set, and name both the decision owner bead and the packet
-curator bead so downstream Track-G/H consumers do not have to infer ownership
-from prose.
+curator bead so downstream Track-G/E3 consumers do not have to infer ownership
+from prose while still preserving the historical H2/Track-H lineage in the
+track matrix.
 
 ## Radical Lever Coverage Requirement
 
@@ -157,4 +163,5 @@ H2 may only transition to final sign-off after:
 1. All required beads in the artifact dependency matrix are closed.
 2. Unit + deterministic E2E evidence and replay commands are validated.
 3. Residual-risk ownership and follow-up assignments are explicit.
-4. Track-H sign-off (`asupersync-p8o9m`) records final go/no-go decision.
+4. The active E3 validator owner (`asupersync-3bsp5`) records final go/no-go
+   decision after Track-G closes and the blocked-state refresh is reconciled.
